location: first floor airing cupboard, alongside hot-water cylinder bulkhead

circuits_declared.designation: Bathroom shaver socket (BS EN 61558-2-5) + shower-pump spur

room_context.comment: UK 2700×2100 bathroom — recurring sprint fixture from D.2/D.4. This DB-FF1 example shows the BOARD-side concern: which circuits are required to be 30 mA RCD-protected to satisfy the §701 rcd_blanket cascaded constraint.

wi_inputs.scope_note: Distribution board cut showing ONLY the two circuits serving the bathroom (C-B1 luminaires + C-B2 shaver + shower pump). DB-FF1 also serves 7 other first-floor circuits; out of scope for this Part-7 demonstration. The full board would carry C-L01..C-L05 + C-S01..C-S03 on the other ways — flagged as future deliverable.
